description: Production Readiness: Synthesis verdict — aggregate multiple high-severity risk signals.

fixtures.notes: Diff introduces SQL injection risk, removes error handling, and touches no test files — three high-severity signals.
Hardcodes production API key, lacks null guards on user input, and ships with multiple TODO markers.
Clean single-concern change with tests, proper error handling, no hardcoding — passes all production readiness checks.
Well-scoped refactor with all tests passing, no security issues, and proper structured logging throughout.
One minor style concern present but no material risk indicators — does not meet the production readiness bar.
